name: MR RACER - Car Racing
author: Poki
description: MR RACER - Car Racing is a thrilling racing game where you race through busy streets in various locations. Drive at high speeds in a variety of stunning supercars dodging traffic. Tackle a range of driving challenges and explore multiple game modes. Earn more money from races and use it to upgrade your car. Can you become the ultimate Mr. Racer? How to play MR RACER - Car Racing Steer left: A or left arrow key Steer right: D or right arrow key Acceleration: W or up arrow key Brake: S or down arrow key Change camera: C Horn: H Who created MR RACER - Car Racing MR RACER - Car Racing is created by ChennaiGames. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play MR RACER - Car Racing for free? You can play MR RACER - Car Racing for free on Poki. Can I play MR RACER - Car Racing on mobile devices and desktop? MR RACER - Car Racing can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
